creator: mur1080224@inter7.jp
text:
Dear Mr. Christian Mangin,
I thank you very very much for your sending the patch(es)!!

I would like to submit the additional patch based on yours, 
whose changes are as follows:
  * Add LICENSE
  * Convert to new OPTIONS framework (OptionsNG)
  * pkg-message: Update the example of menu entry.
      - Since v1.99, the name of a partition should have 
        the form `(hd0,msdos1,bsd1)', rather than `(hd0,1,a)'.
        From: grub-2.00/NEWS

This patch is available also at
http://esarum.shillest.net/tmp/20120806_01/patch2.txt


To the maintainer of sysutils/grub2 (Rick <rick@sloservers.com>):

Mr. Christian Mangin has kindly submitted the patch, so I 
would like you to consider again updating this port 
(sysutils/grub2) with the following procedure:
  (1) Apply the patch submitted by Mr. Christian Mangin
  (2) Apply the patch attached to this e-mail message
